title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.210 - Assessor to examine and compare lists — assessor's book
text:
137.210.  Assessor to examine and compare lists — assessor's book. — The assessor shall examine and compare the list of property delivered by individuals with the plats and maps, and after diligent efforts to ascertain all taxable property in his county shall make a complete list of all the real and tangible personal property taxable by his county to be called the assessor's book.
(RSMo 1939 § 10969, A.L. 1945 p. 1782 § 33, A.L. 1959 H.B. 108) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9778; 1919 § 12788; 1909 § 11370
